problem id: e36a0065
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2)

examples:
  00001000 -> 00100000
  11010011 -> 01001111
  01101110 -> 10111001
  10110110 -> 11011010
  10110010 -> 11001010
  00101010 -> 10101000
  10100110 -> 10011010
  10101001 -> 10100110
  11110111 -> 11011111

query: 10011101
predicted answer: 01110110
